name: Claude Code Agent
description: Installs the Claude Code CLI agent globally via the official native installer (curl | bash). Does not require Node.js or npm.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This dev container has the Claude Code CLI agent pre-installed globally and available on the PATH. Run `claude` to start an interactive AI coding session. Claude Code can read and edit files, run commands, and assist with complex coding tasks directly in the terminal.
